title: Antiquities: Furniture
body:
# Antiquities
![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d1ebdebecdbae305e1a6755d4fa74e270bb06542.webp)

## Supplementaries but old.. it's Antiquities
Ever thought that 1.7.10 is missing in decent and modern decoration mods? BiblioCraft is fine but it's a buggy and frankly kind of ugly mod that uses out of place models often.

Well here I have you served with a backport of multiple modern mods that includes features from MrCrayfish Furniture Mod and Supplementaries but also includes exclusive and customized content!

This mod is not supposed to be a 1:1 backport of any of these mods and many things are also original content, this mod will simply includes the cool content I'm interested in.

## The mod has for content currently:  
- Tables
- Chair
- Couch
- Shelves (6 different model variants)
- Globe (Can spin and has multiple variants)
- Placeable Clock (Shows time)
- Placeable Ingots (Works with modded metals)
- Tool Racks
- Sword Pedestals
- More to come..!

![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b298fad87d9d85ba241c650e2825ce407ddfa1c.jpeg)

## Credits
Many textures in the mod are taken from other artists, which I don't take credit for.

- The textures for the Chair, Table and Couch are from MrCrayfish Furniture Refurbished.
- The textures for clock and globe are from Supplementaries.

Here is the permission I got to use the Supplementaries assets:
![Supplementaries permission](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35630d163427a64741dd2a6225c0ca82a7056582.jpeg)
